title: SPHINCS+: The NIST Stateless Hash-Based Signature Standard
description: Master SPHINCS+ (SLH-DSA), the NIST-standardized stateless hash-based signature scheme. Understand hypertrees, FORS, and how to achieve security without state management.
learningObjectives: Explain why stateless signatures eliminate state management risks
Implement FORS (Forest of Random Subsets) signatures
Analyze SPHINCS+ parameter sets and tradeoffs
Compare SPHINCS+ to stateful schemes (XMSS, LMS)
